channel.title: Dvcs on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Dvcs on Pi Stack

item.title: Fossil SCM: Self-Hosted All-in-One DVCS with Built-in Wiki, Bug Tracker & Forum
item.description: Most version control workflows require assembling a stack of separate tools: Git for source control, a wiki for documentation, an issue tracker for bug management, and a forum for team discussions. Each tool has its own database, authentication system, and backup procedure. Fossil SCM takes a radically different approach: it bundles a distributed version control system, wiki, bug tracker, technotes system, forum, and web interface into a single self-contained binary with a single SQLite database.
